generated_oml:
prefix DTDFVocab: http://example.org/dtdf_vocab#
prefix base: http://example.org/dtdf_base#
instance EnergyConsumptionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for energy consumption patterns to optimize usage"
]

instance VisualComfortInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Analysis of visual comfort metrics for occupant well-being"
]

instance NonVisualHealthInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Assessment of non-visual health impacts from environmental factors"
]

instance SimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulated outcomes for various building scenarios and optimizations"
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization of building systems for facility management"
]

instance BIMMetadataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Runtime metadata extracted from BIM models for digital twin operations"
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Continuous monitoring data for environmental parameters and system status"
]

instance AdjustLightingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated adjustment of lighting levels based on visual comfort analysis",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance AdjustHVACAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated control of HVAC valves for energy efficiency",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance AdjustWindowAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated window actuator control for ventilation and natural light optimization",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance BIMModelingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Model-driven transformation service for BIM model enrichment and runtime artifact generation",
    DTDFVocab:provides BIMMetadataInsight
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of environmental parameters and building systems",
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight
]

instance EnergyOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Energy optimization service using predictive analytics for consumption",
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyConsumptionInsight, AdjustHVACAction
]

instance VisualComfortAnalysisService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Visual comfort analysis based on light intensity and occupancy data",
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualComfortInsight, AdjustLightingAction
]

instance NonVisualHealthAssessmentService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Non-visual health effect assessment using environmental data",
    DTDFVocab:provides NonVisualHealthInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Building simulation for scenario testing and optimization",
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationInsight
]

instance Interactive3DVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization of building systems using Unreal Engine 5",
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance Revit : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "BIM authoring tool used for creating and enriching building information models with runtime metadata",
    DTDFVocab:enables BIMModelingService
]

instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "IoT messaging platform for real-time sensor data transmission via MQTT and HTTP protocols",
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance EclipseDitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Digital twin management platform for bidirectional control and model synchronization",
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService, EnergyOptimizationService, VisualComfortAnalysisService, NonVisualHealthAssessmentService, BIMModelingService
]

instance UnrealEngine5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Immersive visualization engine for interactive 3D building representation",
    DTDFVocab:enables Interactive3DVisualizationService
]

instance EnvironmentalSensorDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor, LightIntensitySensor, OccupancySensor
]

instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors measuring temperature in Living Lab building infrastructure",
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnvironmentalSensorDataTransmitted,
    base:isContainedIn LivingLabBuildingEnvironment
]

instance LightIntensitySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors measuring light intensity in Living Lab building infrastructure",
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnvironmentalSensorDataTransmitted,
    base:isContainedIn LivingLabBuildingEnvironment
]

instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors detecting occupancy in Living Lab building infrastructure",
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnvironmentalSensorDataTransmitted,
    base:isContainedIn LivingLabBuildingEnvironment
]

instance LightingDimmer : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Lighting dimmer actuator within Building Control System for adjustable lighting control",
    base:isContainedIn LivingLabBuildingEnvironment
]

instance HVACValve : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "HVAC control valve actuator for temperature regulation",
    base:isContainedIn LivingLabBuildingEnvironment
]

instance WindowActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Window actuator for automated window control in building facade",
    base:isContainedIn LivingLabBuildingEnvironment
]

instance EnvironmentalData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time environmental parameters data (temperature, light intensity, occupancy) transmitted via Eclipse Hono and Ditto protocols",
    DTDFVocab:fromData EnvironmentalSensorDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto
]

instance LivingLabBIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "BIM model enriched with runtime metadata including device IDs and control logic for Living Lab building infrastructure",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseDitto, UnrealEngine5
]

instance LivingLabBuildingEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Living Lab building infrastructure including physical assets such as lighting systems, sensors, and Building Control Systems (BCS)",
    base:contains TemperatureSensor, LightIntensitySensor, OccupancySensor, LightingDimmer, HVACValve, WindowActuator
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control signals generated by DT services (e.g., lighting adjustments, HVAC setpoints) transmitted via Eclipse Hono and Ditto to actuators in the physical building."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization with continuous data ingestion from sensors and immediate control signal execution to actuators."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A centralized framework coordinating BIM-based semantic models, Hono/Ditto for data exchange, Unreal Engine visualization, and modular services via standardized extension points to enable scalable, service-oriented DT deployment."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Encompasses all building life cycle phases, from design and construction through operations and refurbishment, with the DT serving as a dynamic representation throughout."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validated using the Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric to ensure interoperability and architectural soundness of the DT implementation."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono and Ditto for bidirectional real-time data exchange between physical assets and the digital twin."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "BIM standards (e.g., IFC), Eclipse Hono/Ditto for IoT data standards, and standardized extension points for service integration."
]
